important: There is a scam website that customers are texting in from (https://heydudestores.com/)
If you notice this, reroute customers to the correct website!
send_to_cs: Don't ESC post-purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
templates: For wrong items received use WMP shortcut
For damaged items received use DMI shortcut
For order status requests use OSR shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code is valid for first-time customers only.
➜ Can't be combined with any other discounts or offers, including sale styles
➜  Use cww temp for code issues
The promotional price shown on the Heydude website may not always be guaranteed when cx is redirected to Prime for purchase if the item is out of stock

Birkenstock: Welcome! I'm Taylor! I see you're eyeing the https://birkenstock.attn.tv/a63njxreKVyN 

Do you need any help finding the perfect size?

I'm looking for my daughter, the kids 3-3.5 fit her perfect but she's 12 and growing so fast  I think I want the 4-4.5, I tried A 5 on her yesterday and they were to big and bulky, if that makes sense lol, she's very small

Birkenstock: I understand your concern. If the size 3-3.5 fits her perfectly now, the size 4-4.5 should be the next best fit. It's always better to go a size up rather than a size that's too big and uncomfortable. You can always return or exchange if the size doesn't work out.

conversation.message_text:
Leilo: Hey Jordan , this is Jake . Thanks for stopping by! 😊 https://kava.attn.tv/sl/NSR4p0a8 

Are you looking for a ____ [insert product name] today?

Leilo: Hey Jordan , this is Jake . Thanks for checking us out! 😊 https://kava.attn.tv/sl/xLSzczJg 

Any questions I can answer for you?
Hello, I need help ordering

Leilo: Sure thing, Jordan! I'd be happy to help you with your order. Could you please tell me more about what you need help with? Is it a specific product you're interested in or are you having trouble with the checkout process? 🛒👍

Well, we order our wholesale through fair with no issues, but we sell your product on our website, so when customers order, we order directly from Leilo.com and you guys basically drop ship for us.  But, since yesterday, there seems to be a problem with your website.  I can't access the cart, and the site seems off.  I've never had this issue before?

Leilo: Sorry to hear you're having trouble with our website. While we haven't received any widespread reports regarding this, it could be a browser issue. We find that Google Chrome works best with our site. If you're still having trouble accessing your cart, please let me know. I can also create the cart for you to make things easier!
Using chrome, MacBook Pro.  There's definitely an issue with Leilo.com.   I tried loading from an incognito window in chrome but the problem remains.  This is what's the /cart page looks like:
Please have someone call me so I can place an order over the phone
Hello is this AI or a person?

Leilo: Thank you so much for sending the photos! This number was set up for SMS messaging only, so I can't make or take calls. Are you ok with texting? 

I want to apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you. I'd be more than happy to check on the cart issue with my team and I'll get back to you as soon as I have more information. I'd appreciate your patience while we work on this. In the meantime, if you have any further questions, please let me know.
